description:
Amazon WorkSpaces plays nice with everyone. Access your personal Windows environment on Android, iOS, Fire, Mac, PC, Chromebook, and Linux devices.


- [Windows] Updated the keyboard shortcut to help users navigate from the client application to their local operating system, from Ctrl+Alt+DownArrow to Ctrl+Alt+Shift+DownArrow.
- [Windows] Fixed an issue where, in certain display configurations, not all valid displays were able to be selected.
- [Windows] Fixed an issue where the new client update banner was persisting after a client update in certain configurations.
- [Windows and macOS] Added support for connecting to WorkSpaces in the US East (Ohio) and Asia Pacific (Malaysia) regions.
- [Windows and macOS] Updated the PCoIP SDK.
- [Windows and macOS] Updated the DCV SDK.
- [Windows and macOS] Bug fixes and enhancements.
